summary: Authentication flow meets acceptance criteria. Login and signup happy paths verified. Password reset email flow uses a mock backend but the frontend handling is correct. Minor concern about missing rate-limit on login retries.

blocking_concerns.concern: No client-side rate limiting on failed login attempts

rubric_scores.rationale: Login and signup flows work correctly with proper error handling
All specified features implemented; password reset uses mock but frontend is complete
Existing tests pass, new tests cover auth paths

recommendations: Add client-side throttle for repeated login failures
Consider adding E2E test for token refresh expiry path
